name: Fantasy Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-quart microwave-safe bowl, heat the margarine on HIGH for 1 minute or until it begins to welt.
2. Add sugar and milk; mix well.
3. Heat on HIGH for 5 minutes or until it begins to boil, stirring after 3 minutes.
4. Mix well; scrape the sides of the bowl.
5. Continue heating for an additional 5-1/2 minutes, stirring after 3 minutes.
6. Stir in the chocolate chips until melted and smooth.
7. Add the remaining ingredients (marshmallow creme, nuts, and vanilla extract); mix well.
8. Pour into a greased 9-inch square pan or 13x9-inch baking pan.
9. Allow to cool at room temperature.
10. Cut into squares.
Makes 3 pounds.
Preparation Time: 10 minutes
Microwave Cooking Time: 12 minutes
